Sage Bot Item Code: A149
Flaming Eye

Triggers: Once in a while

Magic Whirl
All allies start restoring 50000 health every second, and enemies take 75000 magic damage every second for 3 sec. While this ability is active, the allies have their damage increased by 25%, while enemies restore 35% less health. When the ability wears off, all enemies are stunned for 1 sec.

Requirements: 90-100
